title: L&T Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: L&T Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!
